info.name: Grocery API
info.description: Automation suite for https://simple-grocery-store-api.click. Covers functional, negative, contract (JSON Schema via tv4), auth, and end-to-end workflow checks. Variables are set in collection scope; the local/prod environments only override baseUrl.

exec: // Generate a deterministic-per-run email so re-runs are idempotent and the 409 duplicate test works.
// JSON schemas — stored as a single JSON string on the variable so each request can JSON.parse it.
apiClientToken: { type:'object', required:['accessToken'], properties:{ accessToken:{type:'string', minLength:32} } },
errorBody: { type:'object', required:['error'], properties:{ error:{type:'string', minLength:1} } },
product: { type:'object', required:['id','category','name','inStock'], properties:{ id:{type:'integer'}, category:{type:'string'}, name:{type:'string'}, inStock:{type:'boolean'} } },

productsArray: { type:'array', items:{ type:'object', required:['id','category','name','inStock'], properties:{ id:{type:'integer'}, category:{type:'string'}, name:{type:'string'}, inStock:{type:'boolean'} } } },
createCart: { type:'object', required:['created','cartId'], properties:{ created:{type:'boolean'}, cartId:{type:'string', minLength:1} } },
cart: { type:'object', required:['items','created'], properties:{ items:{type:'array'}, created:{type:'string'} } },
cartItems: { type:'array', items:{ type:'object', required:['productId','id','quantity'], properties:{ productId:{type:'integer'}, id:{type:'integer'}, quantity:{type:'integer'} } } },
addItemResponse: { type:'object', required:['created','itemId'], properties:{ created:{type:'boolean'}, itemId:{type:'integer'} } },

order: { type:'object', required:['id','items','customerName','created'], properties:{ id:{type:'string'}, items:{type:'array'}, customerName:{type:'string'}, created:{type:'string'}, comment:{type:'string'} } },
createOrderResponse: { type:'object', required:['created','orderId'], properties:{ created:{type:'boolean'}, orderId:{type:'string'} } }
// Global cross-cutting assertion: every response must arrive in under 2s.
pm.test('matches status schema', () => { const ok = tv4.validate(body, schemas.status); pm.expect(ok, tv4.error && tv4.error.message).to.be.true; });
pm.test('matches token schema', () => { const ok = tv4.validate(body, schemas.apiClientToken); pm.expect(ok, tv4.error && tv4.error.message).to.be.true; });
pm.test('matches error schema', () => { const ok = tv4.validate(pm.response.json(), schemas.errorBody); pm.expect(ok, tv4.error && tv4.error.message).to.be.true; });
pm.test('matches products array schema', () => { const ok = tv4.validate(body, schemas.productsArray); pm.expect(ok, tv4.error && tv4.error.message).to.be.true; });
// Save a known in-stock product id for later folders
pm.test('all returned products are in stock', () => body.forEach(p => pm.expect(p.inStock).to.be.true));
pm.test('all returned products are out of stock', () => body.forEach(p => pm.expect(p.inStock).to.be.false));
pm.test('matches product schema', () => { const ok = tv4.validate(body, schemas.product); pm.expect(ok, tv4.error && tv4.error.message).to.be.true; });
// The docs say this returns a PDF, but the live API currently returns JSON.
// We assert 200 + non-empty body and pin the actual content-type so a contract change is detected.
pm.test('matches error schema', () => { const ok = tv4.validate(pm.response.json(), schemas.errorBody); pm.expect(ok, tv4.error && tv4.error.message).to.be.true; });
pm.test('matches create-cart schema', () => { const ok = tv4.validate(body, schemas.createCart); pm.expect(ok, tv4.error && tv4.error.message).to.be.true; });
pm.test('matches cart schema', () => { const ok = tv4.validate(pm.response.json(), schemas.cart); pm.expect(ok, tv4.error && tv4.error.message).to.be.true; });
// §8 open question resolved: bad cartId on /items endpoint returns 404, not 400.
pm.test('matches add-item schema', () => { const ok = tv4.validate(body, schemas.addItemResponse); pm.expect(ok, tv4.error && tv4.error.message).to.be.true; });
pm.test('cart has the item we just added', () => pm.expect(items).to.have.length(1));
// §8 open question resolved: adding an out-of-stock product returns 400 with 'not in stock' error.
pm.test('matches error schema', () => { const ok = tv4.validate(pm.response.json(), schemas.errorBody); pm.expect(ok, tv4.error && tv4.error.message).to.be.true; });

item.name: POST /orders setup — fresh cart + item (writes cartId)

exec: // Create a fresh cart in a pre-request and stash the id so the next requests can use it.

pm.sendRequest({ url: pm.collectionVariables.get('baseUrl') + '/carts/' + id + '/items', method: 'POST', header:{'Content-Type':'application/json'}, body:{ mode:'raw', raw: JSON.stringify({ productId: Number(pm.collectionVariables.get('productId')) }) } }, () => {});
// Setup happens entirely in pre-request; this request is a no-op ping against status to keep Newman happy with a passing call.
pm.test('matches create-order schema', () => { const ok = tv4.validate(body, schemas.createOrderResponse); pm.expect(ok, tv4.error && tv4.error.message).to.be.true; });
// State assertion: per docs, the cart is deleted once the order is created.
pm.test('matches order schema', () => { const ok = tv4.validate(body, schemas.order); pm.expect(ok, tv4.error && tv4.error.message).to.be.true; });
// Docs say PDF, live API currently returns JSON. Pinning both so a contract change is detected.
// Docs say 400 for an invalid id, but the live API returns 404 with an error body. Pinning the real behavior.

item.name: E2E 04 — PATCH item A qty to 7

exec: pm.test('404 Not Found (cart consumed by order)', () => pm.response.to.have.status(404));
pm.test('order has 1 item (B was deleted)', () => pm.expect(body.items).to.have.length(1));
